title: Is Going Insanely Viral Right Now
sourceTitle: Prompt Is Going Insanely Viral Right Now

imagePrompts.prompt:
Turn the attached image into a funny street caricature, like it was drawn by a random street artist for $20.

Use a plain white background. Draw with thick black pen lines in one fast confident sketch. Color it with soft pastel tones. Keep it rough, handmade, and messy in a charming way, not polished or realistic.

Make the person instantly recognizable by keeping the real facial features and overall vibe very accurate. Anyone who knows this person should recognize them immediately.

Exaggerate the face as much as possible while still keeping it cute and funny. Make the proportions ridiculous, the expressions dramatic, and the features lumpy and over-the-top. The result should feel goofy, chaotic, and lovable instead of ugly or creepy.

The funnier it looks, the higher the chance of getting a bigger tip.
